PowerShell($pidFile = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DR Launcher\\server.pid"; if \(Test-Path $pidFile\) { $raw = Get-Content $pidFile -Raw; $procId = [int]\($raw.Trim\(\).Split\(":"\)[0]\); try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $procId" } catch { "Process already dead" } } else { "No PID file" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3456 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } else { Write-Host "No process on 3456" })
